medical_history.history_of_present_illness: This is a Not specified year old female who was found down at a bus stop with GCS 5 and reported recent use of heroin. Brought to the ED with mental status decline->GCS 3 and poor gag- emergently intubated with succinylcholine/etomidate/4 mg Ativan IM total/and 5 mg Haldol. The patient presented with a lactate of 3.7 and a temp of 102.4 and was given vancomycin 1 gm IVx1 and ceftriaxone 2 grams IVx1. Blood cultures were sent.
